notes: The timm/meta tensor 'no-op' warnings were observed during vision-backbone checkpoint loading.
The run is considered successful only when no Traceback/Exception/OOM appears and all actions are recorded.

action_template_note: Nearest template is only an explanatory approximation; model output is an 8D continuous action.

Finally , move ahead to the light gray , rectangular building with a flat roof and multiple windows , medium in size and similar to the surrounding residential buildings .

limitations: Official-style prompts are paired with local demo video frames, not their original OpenFly images.
Video-frame experiments use a fixed prompt and only test visual sensitivity.
This is not a benchmark evaluation and does not produce NE/SR/OSR/SPL.
